description_long: This is a single-story car rental building with a wide, low-pitched roof and multiple gabled dormers, giving it a lodge-like appearance. The structure features a large covered drive-through area at the front, likely for vehicle drop-off and pick-up, flanked by two wings with visible windows and doors. The exterior appears to be constructed from a combination of wood and stone, with dark roofing and lighter trim accents. The building is set on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and landscaped areas on either side. The overall design suggests a welcoming, functional space for customers to rent and return vehicles. The layout and scale indicate it is intended for use in a suburban or urban roadside context.
description: A lodge-style car rental building with a wide, dark roof, covered drive-through, and landscaped surroundings. The structure features wood and stone elements, large windows, and a spacious driveway.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the building, landscaped areas, and the driveway extending along one side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, covered drive-through, gabled dormers, and large windows.
description_view_2: Opposite rear view with a clear look at the back wing and the driveway running parallel to the building.
description_view_3: Alternate front view emphasizing the wide covered area, multiple entry points, and landscaped beds.
